name: Asbestos-Containing Material Removal Dataset
description: Comprehensive contamination dataset for Asbestos-Containing Material. Includes chemical composition, safety metrics, PPE requirements, and laser removal parameters for effective contamination removal.

measurementTechnique: Laser contamination removal analysis, safety assessment, chemical characterization

includedInDataCatalog.name: Z-Beam Contamination Removal Database
includedInDataCatalog.description: Comprehensive database of contamination removal parameters, safety data, and laser cleaning specifications

contaminant.name: Asbestos-Containing Material
contaminant.description: Asbestos-coating contamination creates removal difficulties because fibrous silicate insulation builds up on surfaces during applications. This layer forms through exposure and shows fibrous texture so it differs from smooth contaminants. On steel pipes, boilers, and concrete, it clings tightly and resists scraping, but laser cleaning works effectively by ablating fibers precisely without harming bases.

fireExplosionRisk.description: Minimal fire risk with standard precautions and adequate ventilation
fireExplosionRisk.mitigation: Standard fire safety precautions, extinguisher available within 15m

toxicGasRisk.description: Multiple toxic compounds detected: Crystalline Silica (as quartz), Asbestos Fibers, Carbon Monoxide - requires enhanced protection
toxicGasRisk.mitigation: N95 or P100 respirator for particulate control, standard ventilation. WARNING: Crystalline Silica (as quartz), Asbestos Fibers - known carcinogen(s), minimize exposure

visibilityHazard.description: Moderate visibility reduction (40-60%), significant particulate haze
visibilityHazard.mitigation: Ensure clear sight lines, use source extraction, maintain awareness of surroundings

ventilationRequirements.rationale: Standard industrial ventilation (12 ACH) for particulate control
